quests.title: Thanks for playing Souls of Avarice modpack by YoItSoul
Break some gravel
description: Gravel is key to getting your first tools!
Break some,, and hope to get some raw flint!

quests.title: Raw Flint
description: Great! You've gotten som raw flint, now bash it against a rock and see what happens!
Note: This process isn't garunteed to work!

quests.title: The Primitive Way
description: Some say it's a prmitive start... some say it's a tough beginning!!

quests.title: Plant Fiber
description: Using your new fancy knife, you should try cutting some grass to get plant fibers!

quests.title: Finally!
description: A tough block of wood allows you to make your standard wooden tools! That wasn't so hard was it...

rewards.command: /give @p minecraft:paper{tag:{display:{Lore:["It reads:","I've been waiting for you for ages, claim your quest rewards by pressing E and clicking 'Quests' at the top left RIGHT NOW!!"],Name:"A Sticky Note"}}} 1

quests.title: Create..ive?
description: Congrats! Youu've founnd a compound that allows you to make cheap, high strength compounds using your new furnace!

quests.title: Choose your difficulty
description: In the "pack mode" chapter, you must select your pack mode BEFORE completing this quest!
If you don't, you will potentially be locked into a pack mode you don't want to play.

quests.title: A step forward
description: While you can choose to make any number of the wooden tools, I would recommend the axe... so you can chop more wood!

quests.title: Ultimate Energy Storage
description: Craft an Energy Core which can store a ridiculous amount of energy

quests.title: Fusion Crafting
description: Craft a Fusion Crafting Core and a Basic Crafting Injector

quests.title: Draconic Fusion
description: Obtain a Block of Awakened Draconium via Fusion Crafting

quests.title: Fusion Awakened
description: Upgrade your Fusion Injector to Awakened tier

quests.title: Land of Chaos
description: Kill the Chaos Guardian and obtain a Chaos Shard

quests.title: Chaotic Fusion
description: Upgrade your Fusion Injector to Chaotic tier

quests.title: The Force Awakens
description: Original items: Draconic Staff Of Power (draconicevolution)

quests.title: Game Guide
description: Open the modpack guide book in your inventory and read it carefully

quests.title: A Glimpse of the Abyss
description: To summon the wither, you have to first defeat the guardian of the Abyssal Wastelands, Asorah, and craft an Awakened Eye.

quests.title: Twilight Shield
description: Use the Twilight Shield before you can go to the Nether safely

quests.title: Ender Charm
description: You can't go to The End before using an Ender Charm
